working_on: Fix Issue #8: routine sessions cannot see SUPABASE_DB_URL because (a) .env is gitignored and not propagated to worktrees, and (b) no engine tool calls load_dotenv. Land Option A walk-up loader (engine/tools/load_env.py) wired into check_target.py and validate.py main().
declared_scope: Land engine/tools/load_env.py with walk-up dotenv loader (find_dotenv + load_dotenv + load_dotenv_walk_up); write engine/tools/test_load_env.py with ~10 tests covering walk-up traversal, override semantics, and idempotency; wire load_dotenv_walk_up() into engine/tools/check_target.py main() and engine/tools/validate.py main(); reuse parse_env() from setup_env.py; verify end-to-end by running check_target.py from this worktree (which has no local .env) and confirming migration_applied advances past 'SUPABASE_DB_URL not set' to a live DB query; close Issue #8; append Resolved line to the would-be-S-0049 HANDOFF entry. End state: backlog 3 open -> 2 (#8 closed; #1, #2 remain upstream).
outcome_summary: Fixed Issue #8 via Option A walk-up dotenv loader. New engine/tools/load_env.py (find_dotenv + load_dotenv + load_dotenv_walk_up); 14 tests; wired into check_target.py and validate.py main(). Reuses parse_env from S-0048's setup_env.py. validate.py psycopg ImportError flipped from hard-fail to soft-skip (graph_audit_skipped + stderr note) so pre-commit's system Python keeps working. Live e2e from this worktree (no local .env, SUPABASE_DB_URL unset): check_target.py correctly queries DB, validate.py runs 30 checks (was 23). HANDOFF entry from would-be-S-0049 routine fire updated with Resolved line. Backlog 3 -> 2 (only upstream MemPalace #1, #2 remain). Validator clean: 23 checks default-mode, 0 hard-fails, 3 issue_collision soft-warns at close. pytest 576/576 (was 562; +14). ADR count unchanged at 51. User can resume paideia-engine-loop Routine in Hourly mode.

scope_delivery.explanation: All five declared_scope deliverables landed: load_env.py + tests + wire-in to check_target.py main() + wire-in to validate.py main() + parse_env reuse from setup_env.py + e2e verification from this worktree + HANDOFF Resolved line + Issue #8 closed. One in-session adjustment not in declared_scope: validate.py psycopg ImportError soft-skip flip (necessary follow-on because the walk-up auto-loads SUPABASE_DB_URL into pre-commit's system-Python context where psycopg isn't available; without the soft-skip flip, every pre-commit would hard-fail). Adjustment is fully consistent with declared scope (close Issue #8 cleanly) and was a routine in-session judgment call recorded here per ADR 0049. No user-confirmation needed because the adjustment kept scope boundaries intact rather than expanding them.
